items.title: G-Group receives investment certificate for US$300 million AI campus
items.summary: Large-scale AI and digital infrastructure investment signals demand for data, cloud, enterprise technology, and supporting services in Vietnam.

items.title: HCM City's economy expands 8.55% in H1
items.summary: Ho Chi Minh City remains a key entry point for consumer, services, office, retail, and B2B expansion into Vietnam.

items.title: Retail sales, consumer services up nearly 13% in first half
items.summary: Rising retail and service revenue supports the case for consumer brands to test Vietnam with measured, city-by-city market entry.

items.title: Vietnam launches pilot carbon trading exchange
items.summary: Carbon market development creates future opportunities for ESG, compliance, manufacturing, energy, and advisory-linked services.

items.title: Eight major infrastructure projects break ground in Ho Chi Minh City
items.summary: Major infrastructure spending can shift property, logistics, industrial, retail, and office-location decisions for new entrants.

items.title: Gold prices edge up
items.summary: Vietnam market and currency-sensitive headlines are useful signals for owners watching consumer confidence, inflation, and investment sentiment.
